full_text:
Kong Yi (Yuanjun) 孔乂 (元儁)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Yi (孔乂), styledYuanjun (元儁), was born in Lu Commandery. Descendant of Confucius. A model chancellor for Jinan and was later Minister Herald. Kong Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
